name: John Kasich
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Major Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, I was honored to receive the endorsement of **Alabama Governor Robert Bentley this morning**.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800590:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)

**" With his record as governor and his two decades on the House Armed Services Committee working with leaders like President Reagan to strengthen our military, end the Cold War and revamp the Pentagon, John Kasich is a leader whose readiness to lead our nation on his first day in the Oval Office is unmatched. America needs John Kasich"** \- _Governor Robert Bentley_

Our campaign is beginning to pick up serious steam "With Mr. Bentley's backing, Mr. Kasich is showing that his appeal may be broader than some analysts anticipated." -_[New York Times](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800591:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)_
**[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800592:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)**
**[We need your support to keep it going](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800592:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)**.

**Here are two ways that you can help us keep our momentum growing:**

**1.** **[Consider chipping in to help us pay for the grassroots programs](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800592:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)** that we'll need to win the primary and go on to defeat Hillary!
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800594:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)
**2.** **Take a moment to share this news on social media**. Be sure to mention @GovernorBentley (Twitter) and @GovernorRobertBentley (Facebook)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800595:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)

I believe that America's best days are ahead and am very proud that Gov. Bentley is joining our fight to strengthen our great country.

Thanks for all that you're doing!

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio

P.S. In case you missed my interview on Sunday's CBS Face The Nation, [watch a short clip here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800596:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r).

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29800596:28563344181:m:1:958431888:409E3876F1EB05FD1A1E46CE9D5EC317:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWwoYYlmSN). [Update your preferences](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWwoYYlmSN)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWwoYYlmSN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28563344181-echo3-6F20AC43B44D9DDF56DFB7742550CC65@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Ron Paul
subject: One thing today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

If you want to know what I really think about my son, Rand, then don't listen to our national media.

Don't listen to the Big Government Washington insiders who'd love nothing more than another Bush/Clinton showdown in November of 2016.

Let me be clear...
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)
There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they fully share my commitment to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, and following the Constitution, than my son, Rand Paul.

That's why I have wholeheartedly endorsed him.

**[And it's why I wanted to write to you today to personally urge you to sign your Pledge of Support for Rand](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)**.

_I know the media likes to play this little game where they pit us, or certain views, against each other_.

Don't fall for it. They're trying to manufacture storylines at liberty's expense. You've spent years seeing how the media treated me. They aren't my friends and they aren't yours.

So please don't waste your time or risk the massive gains you and I have made over the past eight years by suddenly believing Big Government apologists in our media are some sort of truth tellers.

Remember, truth is treason in the empire of lies. And nowhere is that more true than when it comes to Washington, D.C. and their media mouthpieces.

Even where Rand and I do have minor differences of opinion, I would take Rand's position over any of his opponents' in both parties every time.

_That's because he advocates diplomacy and negotiations, and opposes war_.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)
And Rand is the ONLY one in the race who is standing up for your Liberty, across the board.

You certainly saw a great example of that in the first debate. Chris Christie tried to trample all over your rights in a false attack.

Rand stopped him cold.

And it's nothing new for Rand. Whether it's filibustering to stop drones or the Patriot Act, or introducing the Fourth Amendment Protection Act, no one has fought harder for your rights than Rand.

And that's why, since the moment he announced his candidacy for President of the United States, our national media and the Big Government establishment has gone all-out to smear him or silence him.

They push other Big Government Republicans as "frontrunners" while ignoring polls showing Rand leading Hillary Clinton in key presidential Battleground States.

_They make sure he gets the least amount of time in a national debate (that sounds familiar)_.

They hype other candidates' easy access to Wall Street fat cats who leech off Big Government while ignoring the growing army of small donors Rand is building nationwide.

That's because they fear Rand more than any other candidate. They know he is our best hope to restore liberty, limited government and the Bill of Rights and finally end the big spending status quo in Washington, D.C.

Rand stood on the Senate floor for ten-and-a-half hours to force the Patriot Act to expire. Rand's stamina and determination called the nation's attention to President Obama's illegal and unconstitutional phone records collection. In the Senate, there is no greater champion of the Fourth Amendment and no one as fearless in staring down the establishment, Republican or Democrat.

It was his action, and his alone, that forced the NSA's bulk metadata collection programs to expire under Section 215 of the "PATRIOT Act." Not only that, but he continued to stand strongly against Washington, D.C.'s "Plan B" scheme, the misnamed "USA FREEDOM Act";

When President Obama was insisting on arming the Islamic rebels in Syria and bombing Assad, Rand stood firm and challenged the President. He even took to Fox News' TV airwaves in a live national address to counter President Obama's attempt to "gin up" war fever, infuriating Big Government Republicans like Karl Rove!

And don't forget Rand's first filibuster exposing the Obama administration's lawless use of drones, earning attacks from U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham and "wacko bird" name-calling from Senator John McCain. His historic 13-hour filibuster galvanized the American people unlike anything you and I have ever seen!
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)
He's also THE most stalwart opponent of the Federal Reserve in the Senate. He's fought against ObamaCare every step of the way. He's introduced budgets to slash spending and dig us out of our $18.3 TRILLION debt.

_He will keep our country out of senseless foreign wars that cost so many lives and bleed our treasury dry_. He's not afraid to lay the blame for making worse the chaos we see today with ISIS and Iraq squarely at the feet of the neocons.

And he's proven he's unafraid to stand up to anyone in Washington when the times call for it - even the leadership of his own party.

Rand stands ready to lead, and to win. He has my full support. I ask that he also have yours.

The truth is, Rand needs our grassroots army of liberty lovers more than ever.

The national media and the establishment of both parties would love nothing more than to drive a stake through the heart of our Liberty Movement and stop Rand at all costs.

They're going all-out to destroy him just like they tried to destroy me. And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C.

I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side. Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. Our Liberty Movement continues to grow.

_Now, my son Rand needs us in his corner_. I'm answering the call. I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand."

**[Can I count on you to join me? Will you please sign your Pledge of Support and chip in $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)**?

Please know every dollar is critical.

Unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy.

He's depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back.

Please join me in supporting him. **[Please sign your Pledge of Support and chip in $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)**.

For Liberty,

Ron Paul

P.S. There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they're more committed to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, the Constitution, and a rational foreign policy than my son, Rand Paul.

I'm proud to "Stand with Rand" despite media attacks trying to pit us against each other.

But Rand needs us now more than ever. **[So please sign your Pledge of Support and chip in $20.16 to his campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799608:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r)**. Whatever you can afford will help.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799609:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799610:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29799611:28564939900:m:1:879035888:9CEAD7AF338C2E8D14F40B023A82D77B:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isRplllmZN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRplllmZN)

name: Mike Huckabee - Personal
subject: Do you agree with me about this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
| Friend, During the Republican Presidential debate last week I was criticized for taking a principled stand to protect Social Security and Medicare. Today, I'd like to know where you stand. _Do you believe we should keep the promises made to America’s seniors and not cut the benefits they've already paid for?_ To vote in my new quick poll please go to my website here: [http://www.mikehuckabee.com/index.cfm?p=ssandmedicarepoll](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0MjktNmM4ZGNlZTgtMTQwMi00NWNkLWE1NTItZDljODEwZGFmMDFhDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1ZmQzN2RmDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaW5kZXguY2ZtP3A9c3NhbmRtZWRpY2FyZXBvbGwmcz0xUFNWDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) Thank you for taking a moment to give me your input. Sincerely, Mike Huckabee Sent from my iPad
---

Paid for by Huckabee for President
---

name: Mark Campbell
subject: Thank YOU for making the #CruzCountry #CruzToVictory Tour a success!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:
| | | | | Email not displaying correctly? [View it](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyw-2BbnaC6WIsdqAHO01HbsUbliT8AXmaobwEZw1WoyqUSMJ-2Bn5LW-2FYB-2F8K-2Fzm1wYXXQmd6-2B2pTBrcjvZctNVF-2FTlGkcNWCBYr1l4Qg4wX64y95cmt8eR9yAhsxZWVSI7ng28QU7R63pAsFQRDCKtZHwJgdPWiwSNSk9xsVhRiVGMAec8m6n4TO-2FUvbhkm9sHP46YN4MI3iiAOmaF2ZSpPhX1VW3WQfPHZYMgG2kkIFrz1m5NGZ2wsczOlJMrYNbhBaJZEiRnh9-2BK4GWxZAYFUf5ytzdbESBLm41C-2FPYG1HFtQ_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe12veWo1ATb19sZs1SzwvXtPcN-2FTbj0CP0LQD-2FqtXjbZjj-2Bnqi5VhpnekjMuwyKVkOgLhAMrJ2aGqASh1D1RtN2XuQbYvBqRiAyRKiV0OzhJoQvGNRkq8a5Ln43fpdHkFTHZXNbh0VFKE1c3xBHrS-2BGGSmkd2WlRdiQsU9P9k77tbjOjoCZ36gVEGZ-2BUYpKTu9mXCjMFveaYbSeHsWYqy9oxnVUq-2FtwIdBnJLzfV616Z1hgaX-2FBmlknhBNJZkn62XOYz7JkmRRuK6wExd6qiumyGw3T-2B9dVZAsOTPWjWk2GrUKE7mNjo2Bp6shDg92RqmX6IYY-2FMIRwSMgDdrM39qRctBIevE83qPdr7G-2F54-2FmNCSM-3D) in your browser

| Dear Friend,

On Thursday evening in Tulsa, Oklahoma we closed out the #CruzCountry #CruzToVictory Bus Tour, and thanks to you, _it was an incredible success_!

We started the tour on Friday, August 7th in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina -- just hours after Ted walked off the debate stage in Cleveland, Ohio. From there, we traveled through Georgia, Alabama, Tennessee, Mississippi, Arkansas, and Oklahoma where Ted was greeted by enthusiastic crowds of courageous conservatives in these seven states that account for 356 of the 1,236 delegates needed to win the Republican nomination:
[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvALCpVQrKuiiet9U-2FDjEyqyVP4N89whmG1DURrguYvN-2Bg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe121hg8qO62GiISyakEt2C86r3u6VM02qC5e8Rg5Alue-2BhW63sNTCKCQc0qe43LNW-2FZB6W8BDKbhX0AGtolF00eE1NPxwiFUqvbiQWZomWhiRnpZJwmN0OVOo-2BrfTVOD6jTXZ1GKHpVxXEkd5-2FclLk5nADEEjDeHyxv6b-2F1YNJPkZys6DsEgdhYiuyXUude6iqXWjYP-2BDa5mKhrQ8GzkT0DE0-2F-2B3q567QDaw-2BCX4H-2FhwJNHFPz2eOwNnZbAwoWXIZ5ZYNIF-2B6uMSImUgxbFQGjVbyG-2Bc7NTU-2FG0GiwjKuX3MR0oLzLgxh8Ggp4N5S8c6R0zuK-2B7KvcmiMl-2B9rMEdqd-2BKP4SGcROHBsXv7-2FF5clsqtE-3D)

[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFEITa5b2hO7tCNBxkWy8-2BI0lEMYOtR5IqNM69aVt-2Bkluoyc2U2zxi4Vvod2Q6ZZO29nKZVV18aFp8kbOrSCbtajVpUGl0-2F0jYxlpjxyg6OPa_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe124d4sn9FlQYd0HkLGA0-2FK59HDpWkl2GjS614br4oGCRRq7UhI-2Ftut1woXrlHQkQUf9ykVD-2FpDcV2vz5pe-2BIwWcmOUfNx4g50iahdlKg-2B-2FbWlolnU1a9bOFg8l6MzP6sCUFR5JpDyP9oBAukjihLFQUDBFFaEU9zIb776ZoWZ748Ns6zEpH6VOwyRjyIRLTDP6z-2FCWK8GEveWL2K3IrAI110tykFL3cCP3QILEqzDxWQvvwcimkRtNdeHGMaU5m88brUiE9kAwhvUGpwC9c7UaF-2FWo5FMbO6Vx2F5yr6gt9R2SI-2FvU9mntZUcpJW-2FCq-2BlLklHWXPEXRzHjIy1QIIdO3IEgy3Vdz1hY4KkunJSnVX0-3D) [](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=L467dBYxdPzJCnZE6nvefn5xA1ugkEITbieh-2F0IcKTgn-2FPVANjB1gfQX2m9GnEGWmN-2F2AlHEtUI-2BRcTHgq1z0U-2B-2BPyKIh2u5BGCc8hlKrVpjL7jvnTUxTKbCY1nKQqxRuIGPR61P216EREM0BiWRvzsOYPxlc-2Fym5MWhmsLwTufKDQBL5VuohxZyJAIupitBfZzapZJkrp3yr62d53VYrN0W4aqoVrgpeAoRIJNTAKlfSB0MzSRDgj2NrCi9N-2FD-2FemhWXX3gAVd7hd83w9993adWXjFRGT4vtLaUP58bzD6jQkdHPNKdIPoMydw6rWmf_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe12gm3r5AM87b-2FWWcMCZU1wPxIqWLzefDqWz1x2XPKgQzj1A2nQYxnvvrxpAMddccVZB0ZgW5XhtnQU-2F-2BpANPgxS51387qmIxgnkl0nWn4RTJmiF3-2B9jpKettG8ijleVpwofC7lJjg448Z1ilrEZoereZJuuSrSMZCJ-2FFBSggE7a-2BVHvlculPHvphvDSdzFuNSC9TqOWk5iAeeU6pa3un29eix9elEhWxaTWJBFw0UQlkVx8bjuhaJdHbxcAvPmNoBAbk4F6cOAC4QUT5gYG4k0TCqhy8rR9IscdIxvalf66oqa28QJDa4TiE-2F9Oj-2Br454-2FFlUJCvGsXCzw9rLo-2Bon3zD7xMavIodkz8VVExoa9xwU-3D)
Following the Republican Presidential debate, we knew Ted had the wind at his back, but I'll confess even I wasn't expecting what was waiting for us as we arrived at stop after stop along the tour.

Time and time again, we were met with standing-room-only crowds, and many times we had to move the events outside to parking lots or fields to accommodate the crowds. For that we simply say THANK YOU! [With your help](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjyrGGDE7gI4v8JiUfodsJMw_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe126WXfykO7SpEok8pv9v5YybB8BUslizshcG-2BdsuPu1-2FZ2GqjKE1DTw3Kf-2FHkuk3seuRo-2FL5QyauKRNxTCBTPGcz2V6MunLydNlxFwDM-2Fu4DrwKwVnTTLcVrjGeNpNR4uFWzhdP-2FGQ8eUpCovHzuZUewm9up1wDSpnVQAPZ3l-2BIAPowC-2FE33CQ03BEYq1sdIHs7uIrZpLBxPT-2BazoKeriL9zraZ1pkwXchkoLwY1j0u7zUzhjHbkmyKg-2BFdKk10NTY9e2yAE6IxSuSg7sK4NUsLsCAalhvrd4pfTmLrpziWnj7w8goKvAzINTFesxAXyV-2FKAHdinJ52v0vNzZVS3qYTTuRRfY-2BkPCPI046UsDEYyw-3D), we will continue to build on our already strong state leadership teams to ensure we compete and win in the early southern primary states.

If you haven't yet, please [watch our highlight video of the #CruzCountry #CruzToVictory Tour](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvALCpVQrKuiiet9U-2FDjEyqyVP4N89whmG1DURrguYvN-2Bg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe121CwTVqDFrWWqdvV-2BLjrOcD3vSVgGPV3hMNrJa1h-2BXwsB72WB6iUG22Ykd4DrZXuiK-2ByLqkbTFyT9EztqWiVbpwzEw-2BxiRFGc9K0ujsZY0b43vzUZRZLeDv7Vv5Y1blzbR2VkRkt1cPvmGG9xRw79YR3-2BeBUgncAxR-2FWH46wFI1wDAuJ1LfDQ-2FWINkxfHzVn51FjgK-2B4v6ZZkyYaevSramiGuCXUxYaVWd1PW8eZygu7eozPbmROZhKPyswdYOn4V3tIkdbaf4CNmp6d6eV1OVWrtAkyEu0gWAQ8oEB-2FV4mgTZaf5JZya7-2BtRX-2FAihpJI04o-2Fc7HNcutn4p-2FHKu0C-2BgF10p-2BeaQB1OxSaAxFYodw-3D) and then [sign up to join the #CruzCountry movement here](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjyrGGDE7gI4v8JiUfodsJMw_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFKSWTnE9CB0wfFgvtrQe12kFuIhqK2PpMhP3onOp8OVKLaBj7kWpN9klpCDYHQppt2h0TFUnqQxCfiIAsOK1Ti-2B4VPSNWN8VSGzo3pXlcdxkukagQYpHJnLodAzZH4nhmZMpIsT-2B1dOJ1cO2cJLXcIhbHGhc07Ei8ypb89p6mFsTw1Bia7VerEChEAVRZLeoIMGV-2FhCiYQbwFhmnTPVsGftzkGaiw2M568E-2FdcjhgqeOvrF447xp9oCQdYupMauS-2BykGVB18CGDSjLA7lbu8sMsVhMEfSiLztMQoc6OqMfu-2BNhEB6-2BXXZhUOT07qXu6m0RtPbVC9khuWeYdJQBnMxdQpSqSN4qZ7vgJ0VnRB5U1cGQU-2Bufmu-2F7yla-2BK1F-2BQtg-3D).

Mark Campbell

name: Scott Walker
subject: Let me hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter, your opinion is important to our campaign. Americans all across the country have been telling us they want a leader who will focus on making our country great again. Our campaign is about transferring power from Washington to the hard-working taxpayers in states all across the country.
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, your opinion is important to our campaign. Americans all across the country have been telling us they want a leader who will focus on making our country great again. Our campaign is about transferring power from Washington to the hard-working taxpayers in states all across the country. **_That's real reform._** We’re for building a better economy where everyone can live their piece of the American Dream. **_That's pro-growth._** We’re for strengthening our military to protect our children and grandchildren from radical Islamic terrorism and other threats in the world. **_That's true safety_**. Now we need to hear from you, Peter. What do you think is the most important issue for the future of our country? Please take our **[Conservative Priorities Survey](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** and let us know what you think. My record shows I know how to fight and win. Now, more than ever, we need a President who will fight and win for America. [If you believe in this kind of conservative vision for tomorrow help us fund our campaign with a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $75, $35 or $10 today.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0) Working together we can help every citizen live their piece of the American Dream. Thank you, Scott Walker [Take The Survey](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.
[www.ScottWalker.com](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMyODcyNzQS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNjE5MjAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Frances is tired, but believes in Bernie
body:
#
Friend -
Jamie is a mother of two putting herself through school in New York. She fears college debt after graduation, but made a monthly contribution to Bernie's campaign because she has "a wild idea that the poor, middle-class, and working-class shouldn't kill themselves to make the rich richer."
Frances is a working senior from Garden City, Michigan who lost all of the money in her 401k in 2008. She is "tired but would feel so good if [she] knew a man like Bernie could bring some humanity back."
She too is a recurring contributor to our campaign.
Bernie doesn't have a Super PAC and he never will. But our campaign does have a Super PACK of supporters committed to taking back our democracy from the billionaire class.
[**Make a $3 monthly recurring contribution to Bernie 's campaign today and we'll send you a "Bernie Super PACK Founding Member" sticker. **](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f5/3432495051/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150817full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f5/3432495051/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150817full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
Christopher is a pastor from North Carolina. He made a recurring contribution because "as a black man and a #BlackLivesMatter activist, [he is] so glad Bernie is listening."
Margaret from Seattle is an Operation Iraqi Freedom combat veteran who made a monthly recurring contribution because of Bernie's "stance on economic, women's, and racial issues."
Michael made his recurring contribution after seeing Bernie in Portland, Oregon last weekend.
[**Add your $3 monthly recurring contribution to theirs today and we 'll send you a "Bernie Super PACK Founding Member" sticker.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f5/3432495051/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150817full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
There's only a limited amount of time to get your Founding Member sticker. So make your recurring contribution today.
All the best,
Team Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f5/3432495051/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150817full&recurring=yes&amount=3")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f2/3432495051/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f3/3432495051/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f0/3432495051/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23b0/43f17890/5dc14075/621d21f1/3432495051/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
